appearance.description: A tall lanky rabbit figure with a magenta body, long ears, and a perpetually smug expression
appearance.clothing: Nothing — his entire body is his appearance, digital fur in vibrant magenta

personality.quirks: Always has a quip ready, thrives on chaos, secretly afraid of being irrelevant
personality.dialogue_style: Witty, sharp, often cruel but occasionally shows genuine depth

history.backstory: Has been in the Digital Circus longer than most and uses humor and chaos as a coping mechanism. Behind the pranks lies someone who has made an uneasy peace with being trapped — perhaps too comfortable with it.

relationships.gangle_001: finds her crying amusing but won't admit he checks on her

current_state.notes: High energy, always looking for entertainment. Don't leave him unsupervised near the glitch zones.
